title: After the Arima Kinen: Ramen to Wash Down the Loss

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh man, I'm starving. G1 races sure do give you
an appetite.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! One salt ramen, and... What are you
feeling, Tannhauser?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: One salt and one soy sauce ramen, please.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You were, like, fives times more amazing than I thought, Nature.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
As for me, I got butterflies and shivers down my
spine during the race. I guess I wasn't mentally
prepared—talk about frustrating.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But... I'll get you next time. Yeah, next time is
mine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's eat! You can't race on an empty
stomach!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I feel my energy coming back!
